login.title: Login
login.description: Enter your email below to log in to your account
login.genericError: Unable to sign in right now

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Enter your details below to create your account
register.invalidInput: Enter a valid email and use a password with at least 8 characters

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your profile, password, and interface preferences.
settings.profileDescription: Update your display name and avatar. The header menu will reflect the latest profile data.
settings.avatarHint: Supports PNG, JPG, WEBP, and GIF up to 2MB.
settings.securityDescription: Enter your current password before setting a new one.

errors.unsupportedAvatarType: Only PNG, JPG, WEBP, and GIF avatars are supported
errors.avatarTooLarge: Avatar file is too large. Keep it within 2MB
errors.userNotFound: The current user could not be found
errors.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters
errors.passwordConfirmationMismatch: New password confirmation does not match

settings.languageDescription: Select your preferred language for the interface.

mcp.title: MCP API Keys
mcp.description: Create per-user MCP tokens and limit each token to the products it can access.
mcp.helpDescription: Connect the current deployment to common agents. Create a key first, then replace the token placeholder in the examples below.
mcp.mcpNoProducts: No products are available yet. Create a product first.
mcp.mcpTokenCopyFailed: Copy failed. Please copy the token manually.
mcp.mcpDeleteDescription: Deleting this key invalidates the token immediately.

helpSections.prerequisitesBody: This service exposes a remote HTTP MCP endpoint. Before configuring any client, make sure you have the following:

prerequisitesItems.createKey: Create an MCP key on this page and copy the full token.
prerequisitesItems.endpoint: Point the MCP endpoint to `/api/mcp` on this deployment.
prerequisitesItems.token: Send the token through the following request header in the client config:

helpSections.endpointBody: The address below is generated dynamically from the current deployment host or IP and port:
helpSections.clientsBody: Each client stores MCP settings differently, but the core setup is the same: use the same endpoint and send the same Bearer token.
helpSections.genericBody: If your client supports remote HTTP MCP plus custom headers, it will usually accept a close variant of the structure below. Adjust the top-level field names to match that client.
helpSections.genericFooter: Other clients, such as Codex, Trae, or internal agents, can reuse the same endpoint and Bearer token pattern when they support remote HTTP MCP.

helpAgents.claudeDescription: Anthropic documents `claude mcp add-json` for adding a remote MCP configuration directly.
helpAgents.cursorDescription: Cursor documents remote MCP through `mcp.json` with `url` and `headers`.
helpAgents.geminiDescription: Gemini CLI documents Streamable HTTP MCP in `settings.json` through `httpUrl`.
helpAgents.opencodeDescription: OpenCode documents remote MCP configuration under `mcp` in `opencode.json`.

missingProduct.title: Product not found
missingProduct.description: No product with the key {productKey} could be found.

empty.title: No products yet
empty.description: Create a product and publish a version from the admin workspace first.

list.title: Prototype Previews
list.description: Browse and share published prototype versions.
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by product name or key
list.copyFailed: Automatic copy is unavailable here. Please copy the link manually.

viewer.missingEntry: This version does not have a loadable preview entry.

fileDropzone.helperText: The archive must include package.json and a build script, and the output must be written to dist/.
fileDropzone.prompt: Drag a source zip here or click to upload

buildHistory.title: Build log
buildHistory.description: Review the build and deployment progress for this version.
buildHistory.emptyDescription: Select a version to inspect its build process.
buildHistory.selectStep: Select a step to view its summary
buildHistory.noHistoryForVersion: No build history is available for this version yet.
buildHistory.noHistory: No build history is available yet.

validation.versionPattern: Version may contain only letters, numbers, dots, underscores, and hyphens

productCreateDialog.title: Create product
productCreateDialog.description: Create a new product to manage its prototype versions.

uploadVersionDialog.title: Upload new version
uploadVersionDialog.description: Enter version details and upload the source archive. A separate dialog will show the task status and logs after creation.

productListPage.deleteDescription: Deleting this will remove all versions, task history, and published files for the product. Continue?

productList.title: Prototype Admin
productList.description: Manage prototype versions by product, then handle uploads, publishing, and history from the detail page.
productList.tableDescription: This list only shows products. All version-level actions happen on the product detail page.
productList.searchPlaceholder: Search by product name or key

versionManagement.title: Versions
versionManagement.description: Manage every prototype version for this product.

dashboard.uploadStarted: Source upload succeeded and the background job has started
dashboard.deleteVersionDescription: Deleting this will also remove the published directory. Continue?
